message:
fix(evidence): prevent u32 overflow in scheduler depth sum

emit_scheduler_evidence computed cancel_depth + timed_depth + ready_depth
using plain u32 addition which could panic in debug mode. Changed to
saturating_add chain.

Also records fresh-eyes audit batch 405: 7 files (~7,493 lines) across
sync/rwlock.rs, encoding.rs, database/transaction.rs, net/tcp/listener.rs,
monitor.rs, distributed/assignment.rs — all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -178,7 +178,12 @@ pub fn emit_scheduler_evidence(
     ready_depth: u32,
     fallback: bool,
 ) {
-    let total = f64::from((cancel_depth + timed_depth + ready_depth).max(1));
+    let total = f64::from(
+        cancel_depth
+            .saturating_add(timed_depth)
+            .saturating_add(ready_depth)
+            .max(1),
+    );
     let posterior = vec![
         f64::from(cancel_depth) / total,
         f64::from(timed_depth) / total,
